patient_summary: Olivia, a 73-year-old female (DOB 05/05/1952), has cardiovascular and metabolic comorbidities documented across records. Primary active problem entries include mixed dyslipidemia and essential (benign) hypertension (both listed on a 06/30/2023 encounter). Laboratory evaluation on 07/03/2023 shows elevated triglycerides (158 mg/dL), elevated VLDL, LDL 62 mg/dL, and iron studies notable for low serum iron (41 µg/dL) with ferritin 266.8 ng/mL. Anemia is documented as postoperative/unspecified. A colonoscopy with biopsy was scheduled and documented for 02/21/2025 (provider Haroon M. MD). Multiple care team members are listed including PCPs, cardiology, pulmonary, and hematology/oncology. Social history entries regarding tobacco use conflict between sources and require reconciliation. Functional assessments differ by date regarding ability to dress/bathe and do errands. Overall clinical status: medically complex outpatient with dyslipidemia, hypertension, historical anemia workup, and upcoming GI procedural evaluation; several specialty follow-ups are active.

clinical_trace.encounter_facility: Singing River Gulfport Primary Care Services
clinical_trace.clinical_reasoning: Provider recorded 'Mixed dyslipidemia' on the visit diagnoses list (06/30/2023); objective lipid panel collected 07/03/2023 demonstrates elevated triglycerides and elevated VLDL which directly support the diagnosis.

clinical_trace.encounter_facility: Singing River Gulfport Primary Care Services
clinical_trace.clinical_reasoning: Diagnosis was listed in the visit diagnoses (06/30/2023). There are no contemporaneous BP readings documented on that exact encounter in the record; a later documented BP goal/progress (128/78 on 01/11/2025) supports prior diagnosis but is temporally separate.

source_page_references: Test Piedmont Healthcare Page 6, Goals (BP goal/progress 01/11/2025)

clinical_trace.encounter_facility: Singing River Gulfport Primary Care Services
diagnostic_tests_ordered: Iron studies (Iron, Iron Saturation, Ferritin, TIBC) collected 07/03/2023
clinical_trace.clinical_reasoning: Provider listed 'Postoperative anemia' on visit diagnoses (06/30/2023). Subsequent iron studies (07/03/2023) show low serum iron and low iron saturation with an elevated ferritin, providing objective laboratory evidence of anemia/abnormal iron indices consistent with a postoperative or non-iron-deficient anemia state; these labs were collected in direct response to the orders placed at the visit.

clinical_trace.encounter_facility: Singing River Gulfport Primary Care Services
clinical_trace.clinical_reasoning: 'Unspecified anemia' appears on the visit diagnoses list (06/30/2023); objective iron studies obtained 07/03/2023 show abnormal iron indices consistent with anemia though pattern (low iron/saturation with high ferritin) suggests inflammatory or postoperative process rather than straightforward iron deficiency.

clinical_trace.encounter_facility: Singing River Gulfport Primary Care Services
presenting_symptoms: Leg pain (recorded as a diagnosis entry)
clinical_trace.clinical_reasoning: Diagnosis 'Leg pain' is listed on the visit diagnoses (06/30/2023). There are no labs, vitals, imaging, or exam findings timestamped to that encounter in the record to support or further characterize the complaint.

diagnosis_flows.diagnosis: Hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus (CMS/HCC)

clinical_trace.clinical_reasoning: The diagnosis entry appears in the visit diagnoses list (source: Test Piedmont Healthcare Page 7). Historical labs in the record show dyslipidemia and an elevated glucose value on earlier dates, which are circumstantial support for the listed diagnosis but are not contemporaneous with the diagnosis entry in the available document.
clinical_trace.final_diagnosis_statement: Hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus (CMS/HCC)
